planners.centralConcept: The central concept that connects all subjects

achievements.quote1: "Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world." — Nelson Mandela
achievements.quote2: "The art of teaching is the art of assisting discovery." — Mark Van Doren
achievements.quote3: "A teacher affects eternity; they can never tell where their influence stops." — Henry Adams
achievements.quote4: "Teaching is the greatest act of optimism." — Colleen Wilcox
achievements.quote5: "The best teachers are those who show you where to look but don't tell you what to see." — Alexandra K. Trenfor
achievements.quote6: "Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire." — W.B. Yeats
achievements.quote7: "Every child deserves a champion." — Rita Pierson
achievements.quote8: "What a teacher writes on the blackboard of life can never be erased." — Unknown
achievements.quote9: "Teachers plant the seeds of knowledge that grow forever." — Unknown
achievements.quote10: "The influence of a good teacher can never be erased." — Unknown
achievements.quote11: "To teach is to learn twice." — Joseph Joubert
achievements.quote12: "It takes a big heart to help shape little minds." — Unknown
achievements.quote13: "Teachers can change lives with just the right mix of chalk and challenges." — Joyce Meyer
achievements.quote14: "The dream begins with a teacher who believes in you." — Dan Rather
achievements.quote15: "Good teaching is one-quarter preparation and three-quarters theatre." — Gail Godwin
achievements.quote16: "Children are not things to be moulded, but people to be unfolded." — Jess Lair
achievements.quote17: "The task of the modern educator is not to cut down jungles, but to irrigate deserts." — C.S. Lewis
achievements.quote18: "In learning you will teach, and in teaching you will learn." — Phil Collins
achievements.quote19: "Teachers who love teaching teach children to love learning." — Unknown
achievements.quote20: "The beautiful thing about learning is that nobody can take it away from you." — B.B. King
achievements.catContentCreation1: Every lesson plan is a blueprint for a brighter future.
achievements.catContentCreation2: Your creativity shapes how students see the world.
achievements.catContentCreation3: Great content creates great learning moments.
achievements.catStudentManagement1: Behind every name on your roster is a story waiting to unfold.
achievements.catStudentManagement2: Knowing your students is the first step to reaching them.
achievements.catStudentManagement3: You're building a community, one student at a time.
achievements.catAssessment1: Assessment isn't just grading — it's understanding.
achievements.catAssessment2: Every mark you give is a step on a student's journey.
achievements.catAssessment3: Fair assessment opens doors to growth.
achievements.catAttendance1: Showing up matters — and so does tracking it.
achievements.catAttendance2: Consistency in tracking leads to consistency in learning.
achievements.catAttendance3: Every present student is a chance to make an impact.
achievements.catCurriculum1: Milestones aren't just markers — they're proof of progress.
achievements.catCurriculum2: You're not just following a curriculum, you're bringing it to life.
achievements.catCurriculum3: Each completed standard is a promise kept.
achievements.catExploration1: Curiosity in a teacher inspires curiosity in students.
achievements.catExploration2: Exploring new tools makes you a more versatile educator.
achievements.catExploration3: The best teachers never stop discovering.
achievements.catPowerUser2: Consistency is the secret ingredient of great teaching.
achievements.catPowerUser3: Your commitment to your craft is inspiring.
achievements.catChat1: Asking questions is how great ideas are born.
achievements.catChat2: Every conversation with PEARL sparks new possibilities.
achievements.catChat3: Collaboration — even with AI — makes teaching stronger.
achievements.catBrainDump1: Turning thoughts into action is a superpower.
achievements.catBrainDump2: Your ideas deserve to become reality.
achievements.catBrainDump3: From brainstorm to classroom — that's the magic.
achievements.catAnalytics1: Data-driven teaching leads to data-driven results.
achievements.catAnalytics2: Understanding your tools helps you understand your impact.
achievements.catAnalytics3: Every generation is a step toward better education.

tips.tip1: Use Brain Dump to quickly capture ideas before they slip away.
tips.tip2: The Curriculum Browser lets you search all OECS standards in one place.
tips.tip3: Split View lets you work on two tools side by side.
tips.tip4: Save drafts to pick up lesson plans right where you left off.
tips.tip5: Quiz Builder can generate multiple question types automatically.
tips.tip6: Use the Progress Tracker to monitor curriculum coverage over time.
tips.tip7: Rubric Builder helps you create consistent grading criteria quickly.
tips.tip8: Image Studio can generate custom visuals for your worksheets.
tips.tip9: Slide Deck turns your lesson plans into ready-to-present slides.
tips.tip10: Storybook Creator is designed for K-2 illustrated storytelling.
tips.tip11: Ask PEARL anything — it knows the full OECS curriculum.
tips.tip12: Integrated Lesson plans connect multiple subjects in one activity.
tips.tip13: My Resources stores all your generated content in one library.
tips.tip14: Use My Classes to organise students and track their progress.
tips.tip15: Early Childhood planner is tailored for Kindergarten lesson planning.

tutorial.autoRead: Click again to auto-read all steps
tutorial.ttsAutoRead: Click again to auto-read all steps

step1.title: Welcome to Your Dashboard!
step1.description: This is your teaching resource hub where you can see all your created content and quick stats at a glance.

step2.title: Resource Statistics
step2.description: Here you can see the total count of all your teaching resources including lesson plans, rubrics, and quizzes.

step3.title: Lesson Plan Breakdown
step3.description: This chart shows the distribution of your different lesson plan types - Standard, Kindergarten, Multigrade, and Cross-Curricular.

step4.title: Quick Summary
step4.description: View your resource summary and total creation statistics all in one place.

step5.title: Quick Curriculum Access
step5.description: Jump directly to any grade level curriculum with these quick access buttons.

step6.title: Quick Actions
step6.description: Use these cards to quickly create new resources or browse the curriculum. Click any card to get started!

step1.title: Welcome to OECS Learning Hub!
step1.description: This is your teaching toolkit sidebar. Here you will find all the tools to create lesson plans, quizzes, rubrics, and more. The sidebar auto-collapses when you hover away to give you more workspace.

step2.title: Dashboard Overview
step2.description: Start here to see your teaching resources, statistics, and quick access to curriculum content. Click it now to open your first tab!

step3.title: Tab Management
step3.description: Great! You opened your first tab. Your open tools appear here. You can have up to 3 tabs of each type open simultaneously.

step4.title: Working with Tabs
step4.description: Each tab shows your active tool. You can click the X to close a tab, or right-click to split it side-by-side with another tool.

step5.title: Chat with PEARL
step5.description: Let us open another tool! Chat with PEARL for help, ideas, or to discuss your lesson plans. Go ahead and click to open it!

step6.title: Multiple Different Tabs
step6.description: Excellent! Now you have two different tools open. Notice how each tab type has its own color. Let us explore what happens when you open multiple tabs of the SAME type...

step7.title: Open Another Chat Tab
step7.description: Click the Chat tool again to open a second chat tab. This will demonstrate tab grouping!

step8.title: Tab Groups
step8.description: See how the two Chat tabs automatically grouped together? The dropdown arrow lets you collapse/expand the group. The group header shows which tool type it is.

step9.title: Collapse Groups
step9.description: Click the dropdown arrow on the Chat group to collapse it and save tab bar space. Try it now!

step10.title: Expand Groups
step10.description: Perfect! Now click the arrow again to expand the group and see all your Chat tabs.

step11.title: Switch Between Tabs
step11.description: You can click any tab to switch to it. Let us click back to the Dashboard tab to learn about split view.

step12.title: Split View
step12.description: Click this Split View button to work with two tools side-by-side. This is perfect for referencing content while creating lessons.

step13.title: Split View in Action
step13.description: Great! You are now in Split View. Each panel shows a different tool so you can work side-by-side.

step14.title: Lesson Planner Tools
step14.description: Click this dropdown to expand and see different types of lesson planners: Standard, Kindergarten, Multigrade, and Cross-Curricular.

step15.title: Quiz Builder
step15.description: Quickly build customized quizzes with multiple question types and cognitive levels.

step16.title: Rubric Builder
step16.description: Create detailed grading rubrics for any assignment with performance levels and criteria.

step17.title: Close All Tabs
step17.description: Click this red X button to close all open tabs at once and start fresh. Give it a try!

step18.title: Your Workspace
step18.description: This is your main workspace where your active tool or split view will appear. You are all set to create amazing teaching resources!
